title: Four-state logic
body:
# Fourstate logic PoC

This is a draft PR with PoC of fourstate logic implementation. It still requires some work and adjustments because some things are not supported yet or made in a naive approach.

## Things todo
 - change `FourStateWrapper` from `typename` templated to `size_t` templated - easier `>=64` width implementation
```c++
template <size_t N>
struct FourStateLogicWrapper {
  uint32_t value[N];
  uint32_t xz[N];
};
```
   obviously with some specializations for smaller widths
 - Implement missing operations
 - Support of wide logic types (wider than 64bits)
 - Better printing - not duplicating an expression, also support binary and hex formatting
 - Implementation of different waveforms (other than `.vcd`)
 - Optimization adjustments - code was tested with `-O0`
 - Fixing of regression tests - many of them are failing due to lack of an implementation of a waveform for different formats
 - Removal of FIXMEs and workarounds
